user.title: Step 1 of 2 — Rate Entities
user.description: Enter your two OctopusEnergy electricity rate event entities. These are shared by all tasks and only need to be entered once.

first_task.title: Step 2 of 2 — First Task
first_task.description: Add your first task. You can add more tasks by running 'Add Integration' again.

add_task.title: Add Another Task
add_task.description: The rate entities from your first setup will be reused automatically.

error.entity_required: Please enter a valid entity ID.
error.invalid_duration: Duration must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.

init.title: Configure Task
init.description: What would you like to update?

edit_task.title: Edit Task Name / Duration
edit_task.description: Update the name or duration for this task.

rate_entities.title: Update Rate Entities
rate_entities.description: Change the OctopusEnergy rate event entities. This will be applied to all tasks.

error.entity_required: Please enter a valid entity ID.
error.invalid_duration: Duration must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.
